query: I just read this great article about event sourcing, want to save the link somewhere so I can come back to it later — https://martinfowler.com/eaaDev/EventSourcing.html
что я знаю про dependency injection? Покажи все заметки на эту тему
I watched a talk on YouTube about the impureim sandwich pattern and took some mental notes. Let me distill the key concept into something I can review later
I've been thinking about how parse-don't-validate connects to the sandwich pattern — they both push validation to the boundary. Want to write that down as my own observation
time to quiz myself, pick a few cards and test my recall on the concepts
show me all my cards tagged Тема/Dev, I want to see what I've accumulated so far
resuming work on the claude-skills project, show me where I left off and what checkpoints are still open
wrapping up for today on this project. Save what we did — we refactored the CLI, fixed the config resolution bug, and still need to add tests
find everything in my notes related to functional programming patterns, especially anything about pure functions or side effects
which projects am I currently working on? Give me a status overview
rename all the .ts files in src/ to use kebab-case instead of camelCase
set up a new Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind, scaffold the basic folder structure
my Obsidian graph view is cluttered, how do I filter out daily notes from the graph? Is there a setting for that?
write a Python script that reads a CSV of employee data and generates a summary report with department-level averages
I need to create a .base file in Obsidian that shows all notes with status: draft grouped by tag — help me set up the formula
debug this React component, it's re-rendering on every keystroke even though I'm using useMemo — here's the code in src/components/SearchBar.tsx
search the web for the latest Claude API pricing and compare it to GPT-4o pricing
help me write a commit message for these changes — I refactored the auth middleware and added rate limiting
add a callout block to my Obsidian note at 30 notes/Meeting.md — use the warning type with a reminder about the deadline
I have a markdown file with some wikilinks that are broken, can you check which ones point to files that don't exist?
